# haARM Format Anchor

> **重要聲明**：DSLspec v3.3 takes precedence over this anchor's examples.  
> 完整規格：`RAPTor/DSLspec/haARM-QUICK-REFERENCE.md`、`RAPTor/DSLspec/haARMdoc.md`

---

## 最小完整檔案結構

```yaml
# {project_name}.haarm.yaml
# Generated by rapt-form-haarm
# DSL: haARM v3.3.0

metadata:
  title: <中文專案名稱> Access Control
  version: "3.3.0"
  namespace: <project_name>

actors:
  - id: <lowercase-hyphen>
    name: <中文名稱>
    type: user | service | system | external
    # enabled: true   ← 預設省略；只在 false 時寫

roles:
  - id: <lowercase-hyphen>
    name: <中文名稱>
    permissions: [<permission_id>, ...]
    # profile: <optional>
    # implicit: false  ← 預設省略

resources:
  - id: <snake_case>           # case-insensitive 對應 DBML Table
    name: <中文名稱>
    type: entity | action | view
    fields: []                 # 需要欄位級權限才填
    profile: <optional>
    # auto_infer: false        ← 預設省略（永遠 false）

permissions:
  - id: <resource_id>_<action>
    resource: <resource.id>
    action: list | read | create | update | delete | export
    scope: all | own | department | team | department_subtree
    conditions:
      - field: <column_name>
        operator: eq | starts_with | ends_with | contains | in
        value: "$self.<field>"
    # fields: [...]            ← 欄位級限制（可選）
    # legacy_bit: <int>        ← 遷移期使用（可選）

access_control: []             # v3.3 §3.7.1，多數可省略

constraints: []                # SoD / 互斥 / 基數（可選）
```

---

## Profile 快速選擇

| Profile | 適用 | 展開 |
|---------|------|------|
| `public_read_only` | 無 deptId 查表類 | read (all) |
| `dept_isolated_crud` | 標準後台（有 deptId）| CRUD×4 + own×2 |
| `owner_only_crud` | 個人資料 | CRUD×4 (own) |
| `admin_full` | 系統管理 | CRUD + admin (all) |
| `read_only_dept` | 報表 | read (department_subtree) |

---

## v3.3 新運算子速查

```yaml
# starts_with：部門子樹隔離（前綴）
- field: deptId
  operator: starts_with
  value: "$self.department_id"

# contains：關鍵字中綴搜尋
- field: description
  operator: contains
  value: "$query.keyword"

# ends_with：後綴比對
- field: code
  operator: ends_with
  value: "_draft"
```

---

## 反模式速查（AP-01~AP-05）

| 反模式 | 說明 |
|--------|------|
| AP-01 | 前綴比對誤用 `contains`，改用 `starts_with` |
| AP-02 | `profile_overrides` 未明示 `conditions:` 鍵 |
| AP-03 | 同 namespace 超過 1 個 `implicit: true` role |
| AP-04 | end-user role 用 `scope: all` |
| AP-05 | `enabled: false` 當 runtime 拒登，應在 codegen 端實作 |
